title: Maternal Mortality and Women's Political Power
notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. Bhalotra, Clarke, Gomes, Venkataramani (2022) JEEA. Table from quotaDifDif.tex, Col 4 (lnMMRt1, no controls). Stata: xtreg lnMMRt1 i.year quotaRes, fe cluster(ccode). 178 countries, 26 years (1990-2015). 22 reserved-seat quota countries with staggered adoption 1989-2013. Outcome: ln(Maternal Mortality Ratio). Treatment: quotaRes (binary reserved seats indicator). No controls in baseline. Paper also uses did_multiplegt_dc and HonestDiD. Uganda adopted 1989 (pre-sample start). Panel unbalanced: 119/178 have all 26 years. EVENT STUDY (5 estimators): All estimators agree on gradual negative effect growing from h=0 (-0.012) to h=5 (-0.09 to -0.15). Pre-trends flat across all. CS-NT/CS-NYT run on balanced panel (119 countries, att_gt segfaults on unbalanced with 13 cohorts). CS-NT overall=-0.169, CS-NYT=-0.170. SA most conservative at late horizons (-0.089 at h=5); Gardner largest (-0.147 at h=5). TWFE attenuation confirmed by Bacon: early adopters negative, late adopters positive. VCOV warning on SA (few treated clusters). Controls (lnGDP, democracy) tested — pre-trends already flat in baseline, no improvement needed. Scripts: event_study_267.R (TWFE+SA+Gardner), cs_only_267.R (CS-NT+CS-NYT on balanced panel), plot_final_267.R (combined 5-estimator plot). | LESSON 8 CASE STUDY (2026-04-19, Bacon-attenuation in negative-effect direction): TWFE -0.082 (paper EXACT) vs CS-NT/NYT -0.127 (+55% magnitude). Bacon: late-adopters 2005/2010/2012 have positive TVU components (+0.10/+0.09/+0.16, combined 27% weight) attenuating TWFE toward zero. Same mechanism as paper 253 (Bancalari) but reversed: paper 253 grows from null to large positive (TWFE 0.74 → CS 1.79); paper 267 grows from small negative to larger negative (TWFE -0.08 → CS -0.13). Together, papers 253 and 267 form Lesson 8 negative-positive symmetric attenuation pair. ALLOW_UNBALANCED=TRUE retained: sweep 2026-04-19 attempted false → CS-NT became NA (panel 119/178 balanced is too restrictive). 0 controls → no Spec A/B/C. Paper-auditor EXACT (0.16%).
